title: The Christmas Workshop Santa Head Infinity Light/Double-Sided Multi-Coloured Christmas Light / 1.8 Metre USB Cable / 23cm Height (73919)
features: INFINITY CHRISTMAS LIGHT – This dazzling Santa Claus light will amaze anyone who visits your home this Christmas! It’s made in an infinity style, with its lights being double-sided and displayed with a mirror effect that makes each of its 100 LEDs appear to be repeating.

VARIOUS COLOURS –With a frame in the shape of Santa Claus’ face, the LEDs match with Santa’s traditional design, glowing in white for his beard, red for his hat, and warm white for his skin, producing a vibrant result enhanced further by the reflective infinity effect.

FREESTANDING DESIGN – The light stands freely on a built-in rectangular base, allowing it to remain stable on a floor, windowsill, or other flat surface. It measures 23cm high by 17cm wide, making it a unique, compact light to accompany any set of Christmas decorations.

CONVENIENT REACH – Suitable for indoor use only, this ornamental light features a 1.8 metre long USB-A cable, allowing for convenient placement when it comes to power sources. Its LED lights are non-replaceable.

CHRISTMAS WORKSHOP – The Christmas Workshop is the leading supplier of all things Christmas related. From Christmas trees & festive ornaments, to fairy lights and projector lights, you can find everything to decorate your home at the Christmas Workshop Amazon page.
description: Product Description Previous page Infinity Style The double-sided lights are displayed with a mirror effect, creating a dazzling infinite appearance. Stable Base Each of the infinity lights stand on a rectangular base, so they're stable at all times. Traditional Themes With a total of 4 lights, a variety of classic Christmas themes and designs are included. Efficient Lighting All of the hundreds of lights used are LEDs, enabling the lights to save you money on energy bills.
